'''âj-s-ch''' ('''kajasach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stagwatch|stagwatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stagwatch|stagwatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-s-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajasach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijasach|thijasach]] || [[word:jijasach|jijasach]] || [[word:shijasach|shijasach]] || [[word:kijasach|kijasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujasach|thuthujasach]] || [[word:jujujasach|jujujasach]] || [[word:shushujasach|shushujasach]] || [[word:kukujasach|kukujasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujasach|thujasach]] || [[word:jujasach|jujasach]] || [[word:shujasach|shujasach]] || [[word:kujasach|kujasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujasach|thujasach]] || [[word:jujasach|jujasach]] || [[word:shujasach|shujasach]] || [[word:kujasach|kujasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejasach|thejasach]] || [[word:jejasach|jejasach]] || [[word:shejasach|shejasach]] || [[word:kejasach|kejasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojasach|thothojasach]] || [[word:jojojasach|jojojasach]] || [[word:shoshojasach|shoshojasach]] || [[word:kokojasach|kokojasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojasach|thojasach]] || [[word:jojasach|jojasach]] || [[word:shojasach|shojasach]] || [[word:kojasach|kojasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojasach|thojasach]] || [[word:jojasach|jojasach]] || [[word:shojasach|shojasach]] || [[word:kojasach|kojasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjasach|thĂŠjasach]] || [[word:jĂŠjasach|jĂŠjasach]] || [[word:shĂŠjasach|shĂŠjasach]] || [[word:kĂŠjasach|kĂŠjasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajasach|thathajasach]] || [[word:jajajasach|jajajasach]] || [[word:shashajasach|shashajasach]] || [[word:kakajasach|kakajasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajasach|thajasach]] || [[word:jajasach|jajasach]] || [[word:shajasach|shajasach]] || [[word:kajasach|kajasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajasach|thajasach]] || [[word:jajasach|jajasach]] || [[word:shajasach|shajasach]] || [[word:kajasach|kajasach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajasach|shajasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajasach|goshajasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajasach|gokishajasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajasachnĂŒ|shajasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajasachnknĂŒ|goshajasachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasachnĂŒ|gokishajasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajasachshĂ«|shajasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajasachnkshĂ«|goshajasachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajasachshĂ«|gokishajasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasachro|shajasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasachnkro|goshajasachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasachro|gokishajasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasachmu|shajasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasachnkmu|goshajasachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasachmu|gokishajasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajasachsher|shajasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajasachnksher|goshajasachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajasachsher|gokishajasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajasachng|shajasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajasachnkng|goshajasachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajasachng|gokishajasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajasachya|shajasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajasachnkya|goshajasachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajasachya|gokishajasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajasachyam|shajasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajasachnkyam|goshajasachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajasachyam|gokishajasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasachnĂŒshĂ«|shajasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajasachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasachnĂŒro|shajasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasachnknĂŒro|goshajasachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasachnĂŒro|gokishajasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasachnĂŒmu|shajasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasachnknĂŒmu|goshajasachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasachnĂŒmu|gokishajasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasachshĂ«nĂŒ|shajasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasachshĂ«ro|shajasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasachnkshĂ«ro|goshajasachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasachshĂ«ro|gokishajasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasachshĂ«mu|shajasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasachnkshĂ«mu|goshajasachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasachshĂ«mu|gokishajasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasachronĂŒ|shajasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasachnkronĂŒ|goshajasachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasachronĂŒ|gokishajasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasachroshĂ«|shajasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasachnkroshĂ«|goshajasachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasachroshĂ«|gokishajasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasachromu|shajasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasachnkromu|goshajasachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasachromu|gokishajasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasachmunĂŒ|shajasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasachnkmunĂŒ|goshajasachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasachmunĂŒ|gokishajasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasachmushĂ«|shajasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasachnkmushĂ«|goshajasachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasachmushĂ«|gokishajasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasachmuro|shajasachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasachnkmuro|goshajasachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasachmuro|gokishajasachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
